accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and reflect its findings and operative provisions accurately.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; references to events and procedures match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of US Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: References the War Powers Resolution expedited procedures in existing law underlying the directive.

exceptions_conditions.why: Summary covers all four rule-of-construction exceptions and the authorization carve-out.

effective_dates.why: Relevant dates (Feb 28 and Apr 8, 2026) are accurately noted; no other timing provisions exist.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the core directive, findings, and exceptions faithfully.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive language without advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across both paragraphs.

concise.why: Efficient with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Operation Epic Fury, IRGC, Strait of Hormuz, and Israel are identified correctly.

correct_figures.why: The dates cited (February 28 and April 8, 2026) match the bill text.
